name: realm-dev
//: host.docker.internal is built-in on Docker Desktop/OrbStack but NOT on native Linux Docker; map it to the host gateway so the vault (AGENT_VAULT_ADDR=host.docker.internal:14321) is reachable on both.
//updateRemoteUserUID: remap the container user to the host (realm) uid so workspace content is written back realm-owned; otherwise it lands uid-1000 and the realm service user can't clean it, breaking down -> up re-provisioning.
postCreateCommand: agent-vault vault discover --json || echo 'agent-vault not yet configured (set AGENT_VAULT_* env)'; realm-claude-init "${containerWorkspaceFolder}"
//postStartCommand: start code-server (browser VS Code) on the container loopback; reached only through the realm port-forward tunnel. Idempotent across restarts.
